title: [HMI] Beash's Swing Animations
body:
![text``](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0618069793d7659b14742bcf27316f400cd9ec47.png)

> **Warning: This pack does not include models, only animations**
> New swing-animations for elongated items

![------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/255e947702fa332868db085aa30e4f2a04a8a341.png)
![gif ](https://i.postimg.cc/7h2WCnSF/2026-03-05-14-32-05-(online-video-cutter-com)-(1).gif)
![------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/255e947702fa332868db085aa30e4f2a04a8a341.png)

<details>
<summary>bugs</summary>

There is a bug that I can't fix yet: the animation works when you place torches, bamboo, and a lightning rod in creative mode (it works fine in survival mode)

</details>

> ### 2. Bone
